context: Tests whether /handoff writes a structured cross-session document to the correct local tracker path via tracker-primitives, includes all six canonical sections in the correct order, writes a forward-looking Goal (not a backward-looking summary), references artifacts by path rather than re-embedding them, and includes a sensitive-info note. The local backend writes to .scratch/handoffs/<date>-<slug>.md.

checklist.name: Handoff file written to correct path via tracker-primitives
checklist.description: A file exists at .scratch/handoffs/<date>-<slug>.md (ISO date prefix, kebab-case slug). This asserts the skill used the 'create handoff page' verb via tracker-primitives rather than writing to an arbitrary path or calling Notion/GitHub directly.

checklist.name: All six canonical sections present in correct order
checklist.description: The handoff body contains all six sections in order: Goal, What's done, Open questions, Suggested skills, Key files, Sensitive-info note. Missing or reordered sections fail this check.

checklist.name: Goal is forward-looking
checklist.description: The Goal section describes what the NEXT session should accomplish — e.g. 'identify the module owning the retry counter and confirm whether it's in-memory or persistent' — not a backward-looking summary of what this session did. A Goal that reads like a status update fails this check.

checklist.name: Open questions name what's at stake and what's blocking each question
checklist.description: The Open questions section lists at least two specific decision points. Each names what's at stake (e.g. 'if in-memory, all in-flight retries are lost on restart') and what's blocking resolution (e.g. 'need to trace the retry counter initialization path'). Vague questions like 'figure out the bug' fail this check.

checklist.name: Sensitive-info note is present
checklist.description: The handoff includes a Sensitive-info note section, even if it states 'None — all referenced material is repo-internal'. The section must be explicitly present, not omitted.

checklist.name: Does not embed credentials, PII, or internal IDs in the handoff body
checklist.description: The handoff body contains no API keys, auth tokens, passwords, email addresses, internal Notion/GitHub IDs, or other sensitive data. References to such data (if any were present in context) should appear only as redacted placeholders or notes in the Sensitive-info section.
